2026-06-25 13:30 PST - Manual GitHub Actions workflow dispatch to trigger subnet-dashboard deploy

This commit is a manual trigger to force Fly.io deployment via GitHub Actions.

Workflow to trigger: .github/workflows/fly.yml
Target Fly.io app: subnet-dashboard (NOT scaling)

This should rebuild the app with all the latest changes:
- Deleted templates/index.html (forces React template)
- Updated Dockerfile with Node.js and version stamp
- server.py serving index-react.html correctly
